Name: FTableColumnHeaderStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an STableColumnHeader

Variables.Name: SortPrimaryAscendingImage
Variables.Description: Image used when a column is primarily sorted in ascending order

Variables.Name: SortPrimaryDescendingImage
Variables.Description: Image used when a column is primarily sorted in descending order

Variables.Name: SortSecondaryAscendingImage
Variables.Description: Image used when a column is secondarily sorted in ascending order

Variables.Name: SortSecondaryDescendingImage
Variables.Description: Image used when a column is secondarily sorted in descending order

Variables.Name: NormalBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the header in its normal state

Variables.Name: HoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the header in its hovered state

Variables.Name: MenuDropdownImage
Variables.Description: Image used for the menu drop-down button

Variables.Name: MenuDropdownNormalBorderBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the menu drop-down border in its normal state

Variables.Name: MenuDropdownHoveredBorderBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the menu drop-down border in its hovered state
